assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AllowOfflineAccess = true
assertions.rationale: AllowOfflineAccess is well-known for enabling refresh tokens.
offline_access scope requirement is well-known OIDC knowledge.
AbsoluteRefreshTokenLifetime is a known Duende/IS4 client property.
SlidingRefreshTokenLifetime is a known client property.
An LLM may get the enum value wrong or use incorrect syntax without docs reference.
